name: Category: OWASP Top Ten 2004 Category A10 - Insecure Configuration Management
description: This is a category grouping weaknesses related to the A10 category in the OWASP Top Ten 2004, covering insecure configuration management including sensitive information in error messages, debug code exposure, improper access to directories, and insufficiently protected credentials. Categories are informal organizational groupings and are prohibited for vulnerability mapping since 2019.
